name: BlackSheep (Fast Python ASGI/WSGI Framework)

auth.notes: Framework; JWT and OAuth middleware available

performance.notes: Cython-optimized request parsing; consistently top TechEmpower benchmarks

agent_readiness.notes: High-performance ASGI framework. from blacksheep import Application, get, post. @get('/hello') async def hello(): return 'Hello'. Cython-optimized HTTP parsing. OpenAPI docs auto-generation. Dependency injection built-in. Decorators: @get, @post, @put, @delete. Request object injection, typed parameters. WebSockets. Consistently appears in TechEmpower top 10 for Python. Smaller ecosystem than FastAPI but cleaner DI approach.

best_when: Performance-critical Python APIs where FastAPI is a bottleneck
Teams valuing built-in DI without FastAPI Depends() complexity
Projects needing automatic OpenAPI with minimal boilerplate
Microservices where startup speed and memory matter
avoid_when: When FastAPI ecosystem (extensions, tutorials) is valuable
summary: BlackSheep is a high-performance Python ASGI framework with Cython-optimized HTTP parsing, built-in dependency injection, and automatic OpenAPI docs. Consistently top TechEmpower benchmarks for Python. @get/@post decorators, typed parameters, WebSockets. Smaller ecosystem than FastAPI but cleaner DI and faster raw performance. Alternative when FastAPI latency is measurable bottleneck.
